name: Diploma in Pharmacy
vision: To be the most sought after academic, research and practice-based department of diploma pharmacy that others would wish to emulate.
mission_elements: To implement the Outcome Based Education (OBE) model.
To encourage innovative teaching skills, research and practice.
To provide necessary facilities for quality academic research.
To create ecosystem for professional competition and lifelong learning.
To prepare students for higher studies, entrepreneurship, employment, research.

labs.name: Biotechnology Lab
labs.description: Equipped with basic microbiological testing kits, autoclaves, and incubators.

labs.name: Pharmaceutics Lab
labs.description: Equipped with compounding apparatus, tablet machines, and quality control test rigs.

labs.name: Pharmaceutical Chemistry Lab
labs.description: Equipped for inorganic/organic chemistry synthesis, qualitative analysis, and titration setups.

labs.name: Pharmacology Lab
labs.description: Features anatomical models, charts, and basic organ bath setups for practical instruction.

achievements: Two student groups awarded ₹2 Lakhs in Maharashtra State Students Innovation Challenge.
Three students started their own start-up.

alumni_testimonial.name: Mr. Raju Madan Yadav
alumni_testimonial.quote: The solid academic foundation, hands-on training, and continuous mentorship I received during my D.Pharm program played a crucial role in shaping my career.
